title: He Really Didn't Know
caption: And then the man in the green coat arrived. He held up his hands, nervous. The garden was his son's. He hadn't known where the seeds came from. He was genuinely distressed. Rosie lowered her magnifying glass. He really didn't know.
story_notes: The green coat man is revealed as Dev's father. He came to check on his son's secret garden and had no idea the seeds were stolen from Mr. Chen.
